title: 葵ステークスの後に・バクシン、極

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She finishes the race at an exceptional speed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Believing her speed has yet to peak, I propose
running in the Sprinters Stakes, the pinnacle of
short-distance races.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O decides to challenge the
Sprinters Stakes, her eyes set on becoming the
fastest!
